# 11b Terminology — High-Frequency Codelists — questionnaires subdir (Stage v2.4)

High-frequency CDISC controlled terminology codelists sourced from ``knowledge_base/terminology/questionnaires/``. Each codelist preserves its 4-column Term table (Code / Submission Value / Synonyms / Definition) with Definitions truncated to 200 characters. "Related Domains" is a codelist-level metadata line listing SDTM domains whose spec.md references the codelist C-code.
